mapper.select: SELECT demo_click_record_id, user_id, coupon_id, coupon_name, reaction_time_ms, clicked_at, round_started_at, created_at FROM demo_click_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND round_started_at = #{roundStartedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_demo_click_record.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO demo_click_record ( demo_click_record_id, user_id, coupon_id, coupon_name, reaction_time_ms, clicked_at, round_started_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{demoClickRecordId}, #{userId}, #{couponId}, #{couponName}, #{reactionTimeMs}, #{clickedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{roundStartedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT demo_click_record_id, user_id, coupon_id, coupon_name, reaction_time_ms, clicked_at, round_started_at, created_at FROM demo_click_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY clicked_at DESC, demo_click_record_id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT demo_click_record_id, user_id, coupon_id, coupon_name, reaction_time_ms, clicked_at, round_started_at, created_at FROM demo_click_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY reaction_time_ms ASC, clicked_at ASC, demo_click_record_id ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT demo_click_record_id, user_id, coupon_id, coupon_name, reaction_time_ms, clicked_at, round_started_at, created_at FROM demo_click_record ORDER BY reaction_time_ms ASC, clicked_at ASC, demo_click_record_id ASC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
